name: io.github.codespar/mcp-onfido
description: MCP server for Onfido — global identity verification and KYC (applicants, documents, live photos, checks, reports, workflow runs, SDK tokens)

environmentVariables.name: ONFIDO_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Onfido API token. Sent as 'Authorization: Token token=<value>'.

environmentVariables.name: ONFIDO_REGION
environmentVariables.description: Region for the API host: 'eu' (api.eu.onfido.com), 'us' (api.us.onfido.com), 'ca' (api.ca.onfido.com). Defaults to api.onfido.com when unset.
